comment.body:
yes-yes, because, in that case the call has $5 intrinsic value at expiration, I paid $3.12 for the ATM call, so, this $3.12 is all extrinsic value that decays away. 
5-3.12 = 1.88
comment.raw_body:
yes-yes, because, in that case the call has $5 intrinsic value at expiration, I paid $3.12 for the ATM call, so, this $3.12 is all extrinsic value that decays away. 
5-3.12 = 1.88
